blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bruh where did you go after school. I looked for you at the side exit.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Daniel was there. With two guys.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Mr. Cole pulled up. It was fine.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: bro I literally told you not to take the side exit this week

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: you know and you still went

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I wasn't gonna let him think I was scared of the side of the building

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: deadass?? the side of the building wasn't the problem

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I know. Mr. Cole talked to me about it.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: That I already know what to do. I just have to trust it when my heart's going.
And for the first time since Diego's warning, I actually meant it.
